items.title: Disclosure sidecar table exists
items.description: DuckDB contains official_disclosure_item and bootstrap seeds deterministic development rows.

items.title: Sync writes disclosure sidecar
items.description: market_data.sync writes official_disclosure_item rows and marks the artifact READY in both fixture-backed and live CNInfo-backed flows.

items.title: Stock disclosures API is available
items.description: The backend exposes a stock disclosures payload with snapshot-bound as-of semantics.

items.title: Workbench renders official disclosures
items.description: The frontend reads the disclosures payload and renders an official disclosure panel in stock detail.
